item.title: Data Science
item.description: I work as a Senior Data Scientist at Silent Eight. I am primarily involved in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and all possibilities of using texts in building artificial intelligence systems. Selected problems I solved using machine learning assessing the comprehensibility of Polish legal acts, prediction of insurance fraud, prediction of transactional fraud, exploration of factors affecting the success of advertising campaigns. In my analyses I use basic tools of descriptive statistics, tools of inferential statistics: parametric and non-parametric tests, regression models: linear, logistic and regularized models, single models: e.

item.title: Research
item.description: Research interests legal language and legalese - legal linguistics Natural Language Processing theory, practice and praxeology of legislation machine learning and statistics the use of these in the study of law philosophy of law, language and epistemology literary studies looking at language from the perspective of legal theory (anormative linguistics) Education since 2020, PhD, Law, Doctoral School of Social Sciences, University of Warsaw Mainly research on: the inflation and volatility of the law, the relationship of these processes to the decline in the communicative quality of legal language, the implementation of machine learning methods into the theoretical and legal instrumentarium.
